tasks.label: test: All
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity minimal --blame-hang-timeout 30s --no-build && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity minimal --blame-hang-timeout 30s --no-build && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity minimal --blame-hang-timeout 30s --no-build

tasks.label: test: Core
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build

tasks.label: test: GUI
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build

tasks.label: test: CLI
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build

tasks.label: verify: Release Gate
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Release -m:1 && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests/RegiLattice.Core.Tests.csproj -c Release --settings tests/.runsettings --blame-hang-timeout 30s --logger "console;verbosity=minimal" --no-build && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests/RegiLattice.CLI.Tests.csproj -c Release --settings tests/.runsettings --blame-hang-timeout 30s --logger "console;verbosity=minimal" --no-build && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj -c Release --settings tests/.runsettings --blame-hang-timeout 30s --logger "console;verbosity=minimal" --no-build && dotnet publish src/RegiLattice.GUI/RegiLattice.GUI.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o publish/release/gui && dotnet publish src/RegiLattice.CLI/RegiLattice.CLI.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o publish/release/cli

tasks.label: build-and-test-gui
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build --filter ExecutableValidation

tasks.label: test-exe-validation
tasks.command: dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build --filter ExecutableValidation

tasks.label: rebuild-test-gui
tasks.command: dotnet build tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build --filter ExecutableValidation

tasks.label: force-rebuild-gui-tests
tasks.command: dotnet build-server shutdown && (if exist "%TEMP%\RegiLattice-build\RegiLattice.GUI.Tests" rmdir /s /q "%TEMP%\RegiLattice-build\RegiLattice.GUI.Tests") && dotnet build tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj -c Debug -m:1 && dotnet test tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests/RegiLattice.GUI.Tests.csproj --settings tests/.runsettings --verbosity normal --blame-hang-timeout 60s --no-build --filter ExecutableValidation

tasks.label: build-verify-fix
tasks.command: set MSBUILDDISABLENODEREUSE=1 && dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal

tasks.label: build-fix-verify
tasks.command: set MSBUILDDISABLENODEREUSE=1 && dotnet build RegiLattice.sln -c Debug -m:1 --verbosity minimal
